Container.Name: broccoli_mcp-google-map
Container.Overview: MCP server providing 18 Google Maps tools for AI agents — geocode, search, directions, weather, air quality, local rank tracking, and more. Exposes a Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint at /mcp for use with Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code, and other MCP clients. Requires a Google Maps API key with Places API (New) and Routes API enabled.

Config.Name: MCP HTTP Port
Config.Description: Container Port: 3020 — MCP Streamable HTTP endpoint at /mcp. Point your MCP client to http://<unraid-ip>:3020/mcp

Config.Name: Google Maps API Key
Config.Description: Required. Your Google Maps API key from Google Cloud Console (console.cloud.google.com). Enable Places API (New) and Routes API before use.

Config.Name: Enabled Tools
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of tools to register. Use * for all 18 tools (default). Example: maps_geocode,maps_directions,maps_search_places
